prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Insulin Glargine 15units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 51.6 kg; Height 154.9 cm; BMI 21.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.3%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 9.7%), FPG (12 months ago 259mg/dL; 9 months ago 269mg/dL; 6 months ago 247mg/dL; 3 months ago 251mg/dL; current 209mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 53.3kg; 9 months ago 50.7kg; 6 months ago 50.9kg; 3 months ago 50.1kg; current 51.6kg), Height (12 months ago 154.9cm; 9 months ago 154.9cm; 6 months ago 154.9cm; 3 months ago 154.9cm; current 154.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 20U/L), AST (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 6.0U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 11U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 47mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 47mL/min/1.73m²; current 48mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 33mg/g; 9 months ago 50mg/g; 6 months ago 39mg/g; 3 months ago 43mg/g; current 52mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 127mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 127mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.6g/dL; 9 months ago 10.6g/dL; 6 months ago 11.4g/dL; 3 months ago 11.3g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.92 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
